title: Fisecraft
description: This mod adds a little bit of everything.
body:
Fisecraft is my first mod! It adds various things: dozens of blocks, items and recipes, but also a few new mobs, structures and other content. It does not really have a clear focus or progression line, but it adds random stuff you may stumble upon. 

It includes items with new movement, such as the Escapelevator, which lets you escape the underground quickly. Roots spawn hanging from the ceiling of caves, and can be turned into a variety of blocks, tools and armor. Find Rootglasses walk through the world and tame or beat them. The Enchanted Golden Apple is craftable with Gold Blocks, and dye is easier to obtain with new flowers.

NOTE: v1.1 and newer require the GeckoLib library to work, due to the mobs added
